scripts.skills:setup: ([ -d contents ] || (git clone git@github.com:cardstack/boxel-skills.git contents || git clone https://github.com/cardstack/boxel-skills.git contents)) && pnpm skills:rewrite-legacy-aliases
scripts.skills:update: pnpm skills:setup && cd contents && git pull && cd .. && pnpm skills:rewrite-legacy-aliases
